Home → Demo Hub → Continual Harness Operator Mode

Continual Harness v5.0.0

Continual Harness Operator Mode

Active Command Center coordination through explicit permission scopes, allowlisted operations, run plans, validation, and audit events. Operator Mode is powerful, but not free range. Continual Harness can execute allowlisted Command Center operations only. Arbitrary shell commands, arbitrary SQL, deploys, rollbacks, alerts, and full fleet activation remain blocked. Every run plan is validated and audited.

Component: Continual Harness Version: v5.0.0 Mode: Operator Mode Shell blocked SQL blocked Deploy blocked Rollback blocked Alerts blocked

Loading Continual Harness operator status...

Status

Loading...

Operator Mode coordinates approved workflows only. It does not enable arbitrary command execution or full fleet control.

Mode: operator_mode Backend: Loading Circuit breaker: clear
Shell blocked SQL blocked Deploy blocked Rollback blocked Alerts blocked Full fleet activation blocked

Permission model

Enabled and blocked scopes

Explicit permission scopes gate the operator boundary. Dangerous scopes stay blocked by default.

Enabled scopesLoading...Allowed operator scopes
Blocked scopesLoading...Dangerous scopes remain blocked
Execution flagsLoading...Shell, SQL, deploy, rollback, alerts, and full fleet remain blocked
Run plans0Recorded and auditable
Validation statuspendingCurrent selected run plan
Approval statuspendingApproval recorded before execution
Execution statusnot_startedControlled allowlisted operation status
ScopeStatus
Loading permission scopes...

Allowlisted operations

Internal operations only

Allowlisted operations can create plans, notes, audits, reports, and requests. They do not unlock arbitrary execution.

OperationDisplay NameScopeEnabledRisk
Loading allowlisted operations...

Run plans

Create, validate, and execute

Every run plan is validated against the permission model, the allowlist, and the operator safety boundary before execution.

Audit timeline

Events and readiness notes

All operator-mode actions are written to audit events, with readiness notes available as a separate controlled record.

CreatedEvent typeSummaryPayload
Loading operator events...
CreatedTypeNoteActor
Loading readiness notes...

Safety boundary

Blocked execution surface

“Operator Mode is powerful, but not free range.” “Continual Harness can execute allowlisted Command Center operations only.” “Arbitrary shell commands, arbitrary SQL, deploys, rollbacks, alerts, and full fleet activation remain blocked.” “Every run plan is validated and audited.”

Agent Command Center, the demo pages, registry presentation, dashboard copy, visual layout, simulator materials, validator descriptions, and stakeholder presentation materials are protected project materials. No license, sale, transfer, or permission to reuse is granted by viewing this demo.

This site is a static, read-only demonstration. It does not enable live automation, command execution, database writes, Supabase mutations, deployment actions, rollback execution, alert sending, or runtime activation.
